sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69519" key="muxoi=" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῠχ-οῖ</orth>, only in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cypr.</author> </bibl> form <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μοχοῖ</orth> (q. v.).</entryFree>
